AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_1.english: So, you're saying Khan said that after watching the movie…
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_1.korean: 칸이 영화를 보고 그런 말을 했다는 거지…

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_2.english: That's why he came to see me.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_4.english: I objected, saying I couldn't trouble the Commander with something like this, but everyone insisted his help was absolutely necessary…
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_4.korean:
이런 일로 사령관님을 번거롭게 해드릴 수 없다고 저는 반대했는데,
다들 꼭 사령관님의 도움이 필요하다고 해서…

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_6.english: No. You came to the right place.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_7.english: If it's something like that, you can come any time.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_8.english: Actually, I wish you'd rely on me a bit more.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_8.korean: 오히려 나를 좀 더 의지해줬으면 하는데?

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_10.english: Besides, I always get help from Khan too.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_10.korean: 게다가 칸에게는 나도 늘 도움받고 있으니까.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_11.english: Whatever Khan wants, if he needs my help, I'll gladly assist.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_11.korean: 칸이 뭘 원하든, 내 도움이 필요하다면 얼마든지 돕겠어.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_13.english: So, exactly what do I need to help you with?
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_13.korean: 그래서, 내가 정확히 뭘 도와주면 되는 거야?

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_14.english: So you're saying it's what Khan wants… He's never clearly said what he wanted before.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_14.korean: 칸이 원하는 거라니… 지금까지 속시원히 뭔가를 원한다고 한 적 없었잖아.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_15.english: I'm curious what part of the movie made him say that.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_15.korean: 영화의 어떤 면을 보고 그런 말을 했는지 궁금해지네.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_16.english: Uh, well… we're not entirely sure, but the conclusion we reached among ourselves is…
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_16.korean: 그, 그게… 확실하진 않지만 저희끼리 결론 내린 건…

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_24.english: I'm sorry! It's a bit much, right!?

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_25.english: Please pretend this never happened! I'll explain everything to everyone!
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_25.korean: 없었던 일로 해주세요! 제가 모두에게 잘 말해둘게요!

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_26.english: No, it's fine. I found the right lead.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_27.english: For Khan's sake, I'll roll up my sleeves and help.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_27.korean: 칸을 위해서라면 내가 두 팔 걷고 도와줄게.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_30.english: If Khan wants a cool guy… I can't miss that.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_30.korean: 칸이 원하는 게 멋진 남자라면… 내가 빠질 수 없잖아.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_32.english: First, tell me how prepared you are so far.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_35.english: The only one prepared so far is… you, Commander…

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_36.english: Um, what… we did try to prepare in our own way, but…
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_36.korean: 그, 뭐냐… 우리도 나름 준비해보겠다고 노력은 했는데…

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_37.english: Sports cars and dresses… they're so different that we can't figure them out on our own.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_37.korean: 스포츠카에 드레스… 우리끼리 어떻게 해보기엔 두 가지다 너무 다른 분야이더라고.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_38.english: And since flashy explosive action is dangerous in many ways, we decided to skip it.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_38.korean: 그리고 화려한 폭발 액션은 여러모로 위험하니까 포기하기로 했고.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_39.english: Hehe… I thought I'd get to see a lovely explosion…
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_39.korean: 키힝... 사랑스러운 폭발을 볼 수 있을 줄 알았는데…

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_40.english: What about Scarabya and Talon Feather?

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_41.english: Scarabya's started working on sports car production.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_42.english: He kept sighing every second, saying he's not sure he can do it well.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_42.korean: 잘할 수 있을지는 장담하기 힘들다면서… 초 단위로 한숨을 쉬더라.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_43.english: Talon Feather's acting as a lookout so Captain Khan won't discover our surprise prep.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_43.korean: 탈론페더는 칸 대장한테 우리가 서프라이즈 준비하는 거 들키지 않게 감시역이고.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_44.english: Well… it's just what I always do.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_45.english: Okay. I've got a handle on the situation.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_46.english: Let's tackle them one by one, in order.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_47.english: Kheshig, go to the Taylor and ask if they can make a dress that fits Khan.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_47.korean: 케시크는 테일러한테 가서 칸에게 맞는 드레스를 준비할 수 있는지 물어봐 줘.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_49.english: But is it okay to ask you so suddenly?

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_50.english: Hmm… then tell them this: they can postpone making my clothes, just prioritize Khan.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_50.korean:
음… 그럼 이렇게 전해줘.
내 옷 제작은 미뤄도 되니까, 칸 쪽을 우선으로 부탁한다고.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_51.english: Then I’d be a nuisance to the Commander…

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_52.english: It’s fine. This is enough for my outfit.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_53.english: Then I’ll risk being a nuisance… and I’ll be right back!

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_54.english: War Wolf and Salamander, go to the Orca maintenance team and ask them to lend some support for the Scarabya sports‑car production.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_54.korean:
워울프랑 샐러맨더는 오르카 정비반으로 가서,
스카라비아 스포츠카 제작에 지원 좀 붙여달라고 요청해 줘.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_55.english: Tell them I approved the budget increase we discussed earlier. They’ll gladly help.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_55.korean:
전에 말한 예산 증액 건은 내가 승인했다고 해줘. 
그럼 흔쾌히 도와줄 거야.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_56.english: If that’s the case, the story moves fast!

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_58.english: And as for flashy action… it’s a shame, but I’m opposed because explosions can cause too many unforeseen issues.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_58.korean: 그리고 화려한 액션은… 폭발로 인해 일어날 수 있는 돌발 사항들이 많아서 아쉽지만 반대야.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_59.english: Instead, if we have a sports car and a dress, we’ll need a fitting “stage”—like a movie set.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_59.korean: 대신 스포츠카랑 드레스가 있으면, 그에 맞는 '무대'가 필요할 거야. 영화를 찍기 위한 세트장처럼 말이야.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_60.english: Quick Camel and Hyena, go to Lumberjane and ask him to create a cool city nightscape.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_60.korean:
퀵 카멜이랑 하이에나는 럼버제인에게 가서
도시 야경 세팅을 멋지게 꾸며달라고 부탁해줘.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_61.english: Oh, and also convey my congratulations on your promotion to director.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_61.korean: 아, 그리고 소장 승진 축하한다고도 전하고.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_62.english: Sounds good! Leave it to me.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_64.english: That sets the big picture; we’ll handle the rest as the situation unfolds—
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_64.korean: 이걸로 큰 틀은 잡혔고, 나머지는 상황 보면서—

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_67.english: Why is the Commander in the Horde quarters?

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_68.english: Who are you here to see?

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_69.english: Uh… well… yeah! I was just taking a quick look around the base.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_69.korean: 어… 그게... 맞아! 그냥 잠깐 기지 쪽을 둘러보던 중이었어.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_70.english: I thought it’d be nice to catch up with the Horde members and have a chat while I’m at it!
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_70.korean: 겸사겸사 호드 대원들 얼굴도 보고, 얘기도 좀 하면 좋겠다, 싶어서!

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_72.english: Unfortunately, it seems everyone’s away right now.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_72.korean: 아쉽게도 지금은 다들 자리를 비운 모양이군.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_73.english: When they get back, I’ll let them know the Commander stopped by.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_74.english: …Haha, really? I’m pretty sure they were all here.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_74.korean: …아하하, 그러게? 다들 분명 여기 있었던 것 같은데?

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_76.english: Since we ran into each other, may I ask just one thing?
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_76.korean: 마침 만난 김에 한 가지만 물어봐도 될까?

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_78.english: Khan… is there anything you want from the Horde members?
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_78.korean: 칸은… 호드 대원들에게 바라는 게 있어?

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_79.english: Do you mean what I wish for everyone?

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_80.english: If it’s something material… I haven’t really thought about it.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_80.korean: 물질적인 걸 말하는 거라면… 딱히 생각해 본 적 없다.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_83.english: Sometimes I feel it’s too much for someone like me.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_83.korean: 가끔은, 나 같은 사람에게 과분하단 생각이 들 때가 있다.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_84.english: Everyone follows me from behind without a single complaint, even as I race forward, eyes only on the road ahead.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_84.korean: 앞만 보고 달리는 나를… 모두가 불평 하나 없이 뒤에서 따라와 주고 있으니까.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_85.english: So I don’t want to ask you to keep following me like you are now.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_85.korean: 그래서 지금처럼 계속 따라와 달라는 말은 하고 싶지 않다.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_86.english: However, if there is something I do wish for…

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_87.english: No… just forget what I just said.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_88.english: I’ll be on my way then.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_89.english: …Khan, I don’t know what you’re hoping for, but

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_90.english: You’ll surely be able to achieve it.
